disclaimer: Financial estimates based on industry benchmarks (IBM Cost of Breach 2024, Sophos 2024 Ransomware Report, Gartner). Actual exposure varies by organization size, sector, controls maturity, and cyber insurance coverage.

kev_exploitation_expected_loss.basis: 26 KEV items x 45% exploit prob x avg breach $4,880,000

ransomware_expected_loss.basis: 58 ransomware threats x 15% exposure x avg recovery $1,850,000

operational_downtime_risk.basis: 51 critical items x 4h downtime x $500,000/h x 5% realization

regulatory_exposure.basis: Regulatory fine probability from KEV/nation-state threat exposure

risk_reduction_opportunities.action: Deploy IOC blocklists from critical/KEV advisories
Activate ransomware playbook and verify backup integrity
risk_reduction_opportunities.roi: Very High -- dramatically reduces recovery cost
